text.title: Django + Celery Background Jobs Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure applying the django-celery methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: define-task-contract
step.action: Write task signature: (business_id, *, **kwargs); document idempotency invariant in docstring.

step.name: wire-dispatch
step.decision-gate: If dispatch is outside any transaction, document why in the call site.

step.name: add-retry-policy
step.action: Set autoretry_for + max_retries + retry_backoff + retry_jitter on the decorator.

step.name: configure-dlq
step.action: Define DLQ in CELERY_TASK_QUEUES and route on_failure to DLQ; wire alert on DLQ depth.

step.name: test-idempotency
step.action: Call the task twice with the same business_key; assert single side-effect.

step.name: staging-soak
step.action: Run for ≥24h on staging at production traffic shape; observe DLQ, retry rate, p95 latency.
